query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS grant_reporting (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  application_id INT NOT NULL,
  report_type ENUM('progress', 'financial', 'final', 'interim', 'annual') DEFAULT 'progress',
  report_name VARCHAR(255),
  due_date DATE NOT NULL,
  submitted_date DATE,
  status ENUM('upcoming', 'in_progress', 'submitted', 'accepted', 'revision_needed') DEFAULT 'upcoming',
  file_url VARCHAR(500),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES grant_applications(id)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  application_id INT NOT NULL,
  report_type ENUM('progress', 'financial', 'final', 'interim', 'annual') DEFAULT 'progress',
  report_name VARCHAR(255),
  due_date DATE NOT NULL,
  submitted_date DATE,
  status ENUM('upcoming', 'in_progress', 'submitted', 'accepted', 'revision_needed') DEFAULT 'upcoming',
  file_url VARCHAR(500),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES grant_applications(id)
);
